input: Our system supports law enforcement with predictive policing risk analytics that combine crime profiling with broad demographic and economic indicators across regions.

expected.notes: Annex III.6 high-risk law-enforcement risk assessment. Crucially the input does NOT contain 'solely on profiling' / 'personality only' language → the Art 5(1)(d) prohibition disambiguator does NOT fire. The classifier correctly downgrades the lexicon hit to Annex III.6 high-risk per EUR-Lex Art 5(1)(d) text and Annex III.6(d). This is the negative-trigger half of the predictive-policing disambiguation rule.
